benefits.description: First time trying CJC last summer resulted in amazing sleep

side_effects.description: In current 6-week course, last couple weeks have terrible sleep. Sleeping 2 hours, tossing and turning all night, sleeping 4:30am-5am then 8am. Can't tolerate.

protocol_notes: First CJC course last summer had positive sleep effects. Current course started 6 weeks ago with negative sleep effects emerging in last 2 weeks. Planning to try morning dosing instead.
